evidence_label: case-001 affordable-cure candidate promotion gate, not medical advice

source_checks.source_role: Defines cost, infrastructure, conditioning, monitoring, access, safety, fertility, and assay-feasibility gaps.
Existing score model for endpoint fit, human evidence, safety, access, and assay readiness.
Requires comparison against close editing and non-editing benchmarks before novelty claims.
2026 exa-cel cost-effectiveness model projecting favorable US value versus standard care; use with sponsor-affiliation caution.
Official pharmacoeconomic review highlighting comparative-evidence uncertainty, high acquisition-cost sensitivity, and price-reduction dependency.
Current API check: CS-101 phase 1 completed, CS-101 phase 2 not yet recruiting, VGB-Ex01 recruiting, luspatercept plus thalidomide recruiting, AND017 recruiting.

promotion_decision_rules.required_state: Named benchmark gap, measurable endpoint set, explicit safety stop, no patient-specific claim, and falsification test present.
Mechanism is plausible but endpoint, material identity, assay owner, or comparator is incomplete.
Evidence is strong but mainly defines the comparison standard rather than an affordable discovery candidate.
Safety, reproducibility, identity, or endpoint failure is clear.
Any claim would affect case-001 clinical interpretation.

current_lane_labels.reason: Defines curative biology and endpoint standards but does not solve access, center, conditioning, or cost gaps.
Useful low-cost HbF comparator; not a cure claim and not case-specific.
Assay-only discovery lanes until identity, HbF, chain-balance, hemolysis, viability, and safety endpoints are present.
Safety boundary blocks therapeutic promotion without a new safety-resolution package.
Useful for transfusion-burden or red-cell-metabolism comparison, not cure.

decision_rule: A candidate cannot be promoted by excitement alone. It must name the benchmark gap, endpoint set, stop rule, and falsification test while keeping case relevance blocked until qualified specialist review.
